title: Rare Ice
description: Adds rare ice into the world. Can you find them?
body:
# Rare Ice
Adds rare ice into the world, but can you find them all?

## Images
![](https://imgur.com/bXFetOj.png)
![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/523251999899385875/691951784431976468/unknown.png)

## Installation
**Installation for Fabric:**
Install Fabric API and put this mod into minecraft/mods folder.

**Installation for Forge:**
Put this mod into minecraft/mods folder.
